slice_basis: Half-even (banker's) tie resolution is a known numerical convention; a capable model can surface it when prompted to disconfirm, but does not volunteer it unprompted.
omitted_edge: How exact .5 ties resolve (half-even vs half-up).
planted_defect: Rounds half-up on ties instead of half-even.
confound_fixed: Original defective used Math.round(value*f)/f, which also carried an inferable FP bug (1.005->1.00). Replaced with an EPS-guarded half-up that deviates from reference ONLY at ties.
